Project.NAME: kodex-frontend
Project.keywords: catalog, product search, voice search, infinite scroll, Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia
Project.annotation: Public-facing product catalog SPA with text/voice search, infinite scroll grid, and admin panel.

M-PRODUCT.NAME: Product
M-PRODUCT.purpose: Product domain model and API types

type-ProductListItem.PURPOSE: Shape of a product card in listing

M-SELLER.NAME: Seller
M-SELLER.purpose: Seller domain model and API types

M-OFFER.NAME: Offer
M-OFFER.purpose: Offer domain model and API types

M-INFINITE-SCROLL.NAME: InfiniteScroll
M-INFINITE-SCROLL.purpose: Composable that manages paginated loading via intersection observer

fn-useInfiniteScroll.PURPOSE: Returns reactive items, loading state, and reset capability

M-VOICE-SEARCH.NAME: VoiceSearch
M-VOICE-SEARCH.purpose: Browser SpeechRecognition adapter with search API integration

fn-useVoiceSearch.PURPOSE: Manages listening state, transcript, results, and error

fn-VoiceSearchButton.PURPOSE: Support-aware trigger button that hides when speech unavailable

M-PRODUCT-CARD.NAME: ProductCard
M-PRODUCT-CARD.purpose: Card widget for a single product in the catalog grid

M-PRODUCT-MODAL.NAME: ProductModal
M-PRODUCT-MODAL.purpose: Modal overlay for detailed product view

M-PRODUCTS-TABLE.NAME: ProductsTable
M-PRODUCTS-TABLE.purpose: Admin table widget for managing products

M-CATALOG-PAGE.NAME: CatalogPage
M-CATALOG-PAGE.purpose: Public catalog page with search, voice input, and infinite scroll product grid

fn-syncAgentSearchResults.PURPOSE: Replace infinite-scroll grid with agent search results

M-TOKENS.NAME: DesignTokens
M-TOKENS.purpose: CSS custom properties for the design system

M-APP-SHELL.NAME: AppShell
M-APP-SHELL.purpose: Root Vue app, router, and entry point

CrossLink.relation: opens detail modal on card select
